title: Surprising circles in Morse boundaries of right-angled Coxeter groups
author_string: Marius Graeber, Annette Karrer, Nir Lazarovich, Emily Stark
abstract: We show that the Morse boundary of a right-angled Coxeter group may contain embedded circles that do not arise as the boundary of a Morse Fuchsian subgroup visible in the defining graph.
